name: Steamship Round
recipeIngredient: 1 Large Sirloin or Bottom Butt Roast, 3 Lbs or larger
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 500 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Cut slits in the roast and insert about 4-5 small garlic cloves. Season the roast with pepper.
3. Place the roast in the oven, fat side up. Roast for 5 minutes per pound.
4. Turn off the oven and let the roast rest without opening the door for 2 hours.
5. To finish cooking, set the oven to one of the following settings and roast as desired:
- 1/2 hour at 200 degrees Fahrenheit for Rare
- 1/2 hour at 300 degrees Fahrenheit for Medium
- 1 hour at 300 degrees Fahrenheit for Well Done.
